narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 3-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,116 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
